data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Central management view', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a central management view, yet the evidence does not include any checks or validations regarding the actual implementation or functionality of this view. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a central management view being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
